content:
# Dhahran Area

**Summary**: The geographic area in Saudi Arabia where the study was conducted.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] conducted research at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals in Dhahran.

- [[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012]] focused on the dhahran-area to evaluate groundwater sustainability at KFUPM.

- [[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016]] analyzed PM10 samples from Dhahran to assess local air quality.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] conducted research at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals in Dhahran.

- [[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]] conducted research in the Dhahran region of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2018-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2018]] collected sludge from the Dhahran Wastewater Treatment Plant.

- [[2019-al-nutaifi|Al-Nutaifi, 2019]] conducted research in the dhahran-area to analyze carbonate gas reservoirs.

- [[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019]] conducted experiments at the KFUPM main nursery in Dhahran to simulate real environmental conditions.

- [[2020-hiba|HIBA, 2020]] used sand collected from the Arabian Gulf coast south of Dhahran for testing.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] analyzed real-time data transmitted to databases in Dhahran.

- [[2023-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2023]] conducted studies within the dhahran-area context of KFUPM.

- [[2024-al-azani|Al-Azani, 2024]] conducted studies on samples from the dhahran-area to evaluate local carbonate rocks.

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] conducted experiments at a site characterized by a desert arid ecosystem.

## Geological and Structural Setting

## Formations Present

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] Not applicable

## Key Findings From This Location

- Not applicable (location of institution). ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 1]])

- The UER aquifer is the primary source for industrial, domestic, and irrigation use in this region. ([[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012, p. 20]])

- The average concentration of particulate matter in Dhahran was 177 µg/m3. ([[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016, p. 47]])

- Not stated in source ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]])

- Not stated in source ([[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]])

- Sludge was sourced from a local treatment plant in the Eastern Province. ([[2018-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2018, p. 40]])

- Not stated in source ([[2019-al-nutaifi|Al-Nutaifi, 2019]])

- The location provided an irrigated system and protection from external effects like wind. ([[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019, p. 41]])

- Sand was found to be mainly quartz after being washed and dried. ([[2020-hiba|HIBA, 2020, p. 38]])

- Data transmission issues from the rig to Dhahran resulted in fewer data points for some wells in the second dataset. ([[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021, p. 96]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2023]])

- The Lidam area provides over 40 well-exposed outcrops of the Dam Formation. ([[2024-al-azani|Al-Azani, 2024, p. 169]])

- Site conditions included average temperatures of 26.4°C and low annual precipitation (84 mm). ([[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024, p. 32]])
